name: Daily Saying KR

releases.author: randonneurs
releases.description:
## Daily Saying KR 1.0.2

### Changes
- Replace template placeholders within about 2 seconds
- Use different sayings for placeholders processed in the same batch when possible

releases.author: randonneurs
releases.description:
## Daily Saying KR 1.0.1

### Changes
- Rename the plugin to Daily Saying KR
- Use English command and quote labels
- Update plugin metadata descriptions in English

releases.author: randonneurs
releases.description:
## Daily Saying KR 1.0.0

Initial public release.

### Features
- Insert a random Korean saying from the command palette
- Replace the `{{daily-saying-kr}}` template placeholder automatically
- Work fully offline with a local saying dataset
- Verified on both desktop and mobile Obsidian
